prestazioni: KA24E to KA24DE engine swap with forged internals: JE 87mm forged pistons (9.5:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, ACL Race Series bearings, and a Cometic MLS head gasket for 12psi boost compatibility. Pair with a Garrett GT2860RS turbo (0.86 A/R turbine housing) on a custom tubular manifold (DNA Motoring) and a Tomei 264° camshaft set for high-RPM power delivery (220whp target on pump gas).

Full drivetrain reinforcement: South Bend Stage 3 daily clutch (forged pressure plate), Cusco 2-way LSD (28-spline, 4.625 final drive ratio), and a custom driveshaft with Spicer 1350 U-joints to handle increased torque. Upgrade axles to Nismo 300ZX (Z32) CV joints and axles for durability under boost.

Suspension overhaul: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valved for D21 chassis), Energy Suspension polyurethane bushings (full kit), and Whiteline adjustable sway bars (22mm front, 18mm rear). Pair with polygraphite leaf spring bushings and a Hellwig 7685 helper spring kit for load capacity retention. Braking upgraded to StopTech ST-40 12.9" front rotors with 4-piston calipers and Hawk HT-10 brake pads, paired with DBA 4000-series rear rotors.
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using Rocket Bunny D21-specific fender flares (2.5" wider front, 3" wider rear) with custom carbon fiber inner fenders to clear 265/70R16 BFGoodrich KO2 tires on Method MR701 wheels (16x9 +12 offset). Front bumper replaced with a custom aluminum tube bumper (fabricated by 4xOverland) with integrated Baja Designs Squadron Pro LED pods.

Functional aero: Custom aluminum bed cage (fabricated by CBI Offroad) with integrated roof rack (Prinsu Designs) and a custom aluminum flatbed (replacing the stock bed) with integrated aluminum toolboxes (ARB). Rear diffuser fabricated from 1/8" aluminum sheet with integrated dual 3.5" MagnaFlow exhaust exits (stainless steel, mandrel-bent).

Interior overhaul: Full custom roll cage (8-point, TIG-welded 1.75" DOM tubing) with integrated harness bar for Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses. Seats replaced with Recaro SRD-E fixed-back seats (D21-specific mounts) and a custom aluminum dash with AiM MXS 1.2 data logger, AEM X-Series wideband gauge, and Defi Advance BF oil pressure/temp gauges. Steering wheel upgraded to a NRG Innovations 350mm suede wheel with quick-release hub.
